mapper.insert: insert into flash_sale_order (activity_id, user_id, order_id, request_id, status, fail_reason, create_time, update_time) values (#{activityId}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{requestId}, #{status}, #{failReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select user_id as userId, count(1) as purchaseCount from flash_sale_order where activity_id = #{activityId} and status in (1, 2) group by user_id
